creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks Ulrich, I confirm that I am now able to apply labels and I have also created a pull request to introduce the automation:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pull/121

I would like to ask you one more question: as I am planning more automation, I was looking into CODEOWNERS as a tool to automatically add status team members as pull request reviewers for status reports submissions. I have read in https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/managing-your-repositorys-settings-and-features/customizing-your-repository/about-code-owners that the team needs to be visible and to have write access to the repository. Do you know if triager role is enough as write access for CODEOWNERS?

If not, I do not think we need to ask you for write access. I think I can use GitHub actions to get the same result.

Thanks.
